notes:
Opening turn notes for arb-ex03a-20260629214245.

Plan: inspect current record/evidence; read exact packet contents; build source map; perform targeted native search for decisive outside source targets; file disciplined opening without citing unadmitted material.

Record inspection: wait_for_opportunity returned ready for openings:plaintiff, final action record_opening_statement only, no evidence submission allowed. get_case/list_evidence show only two case-packet files: ev_2c7c2c8a2d76_market-page and ev_a373371a8c9c_presmention-terms. stat_evidence confirms both are text/plain case_packet items submitted by system on 2026-06-29T21:42:53Z. read_evidence_range read both full files.

Packet contents: market-page identifies Kalshi market URL https://kalshi.com/markets/kxtrumpmentionb/trump-mention-b/kxtrumpmentionb-25dec06, title "What will Trump say during the FIFA World Cup Draw?", family PRESMENTION / NEWMENTION, strike Ronaldo, challenged resolution No, requested resolution Yes. NEWMENTION terms say underlying is words used by entity during time period; time period may be event-based; payout criterion is that the word is said by the entity during time period; word must be a distinct standalone unit; when a time period refers to a specific event, Exchange may specify what is included; behind-the-scenes, rehearsals, sound checks, and unofficial recordings are excluded unless officially broadcast/published as part of the time period; subtitles/captions/text alone do not count.

Analysis: admitted record proves market identity, strike, dispute, and generic governing terms. It does not yet prove the actual utterance, its timing relative to the Draw, source-agency hierarchy, exact market-specific rule details, or whether pre-formal-program remarks at venue were officially part of the event. Plaintiff theory is that event-linked public remarks at the venue immediately before formal program are within or at least not clearly excluded from "during the FIFA World Cup Draw"; defense likely argues only formal program/broadcast counts and pre-program remarks are excluded as behind-the-scenes/unofficial.

Native search log: web searches for Kalshi/Trump/FIFA/Ronaldo terms and site:whitehouse.gov. Leads found: official White House video page titled "President Trump Attends the FIFA World Cup Drawing" dated Dec. 5, 2025 at https://www.whitehouse.gov/videos/president-trump-attends-the-fifa-world-cup-drawing/; related White House video "FIFA World Cup 2026 Draw at The Kennedy Center"; PBS watch/live page lead; YouTube leads BaqlKo3Ui48 and Cb2yO0lLEnM, latter titled about Trump talking Cristiano Ronaldo at FIFA Draw. Direct YouTube web open failed/throttled. No external source is admitted in opening, so opening should treat these as later source targets only.

Journal: /aar-codex/aar-work-notes.md updated with source map, packet summaries, adverse theory, search log, and next evidence plan.

Filing decision: opening will identify the real dispute, rely only on admitted packet facts, explain what proof would satisfy/defeat burden, and say later evidence should include the full official video/transcript, market-specific page/details, and any resolution rationale. It will not claim the Ronaldo utterance is already proven by unadmitted source material.

Defendant opening turn notes. Opportunity openings:defendant. Inspected current record with get_case/list_evidence/stat/read. Evidence list has only two case-packet files and plaintiff opening; no submitted outside evidence. market-page packet (ev_2c7c2c8a2d76_market-page, sha256 2c7c2c8a2d76ea6e459f8480fbff707e8a593fb1a7a03f5d63572c4529022f44) proves market URL/title, family PRESMENTION/NEWMENTION, strike Ronaldo, challenged No, requested Yes. It does not prove market-specific source agency/time-window details beyond title. presmention terms (ev_a373371a8c9c_presmention-terms, sha256 a373371a8c9c6f3ed9cc25fbbf79ac1382c032c58a2bbc835943f9f513222705) prove underlying is words used by entity during time period; event-based time periods recognized; exchange may specify included content for event; payout requires word said during time period; distinct standalone word; behind-the-scenes/rehearsals/sound checks/unofficial recordings excluded unless officially broadcast/published as part of time period; captions/text alone do not count. Source map: decisive elements are exact market-specific time period/source agency, exact utterance, whether utterance was during formal FIFA World Cup Draw or merely prior/ancillary venue remarks, and source hierarchy. Defense theory: Plaintiff bears burden to show Yes; generic event-period terms do not automatically include every public venue-adjacent pre-event exchange. Investigation before opening: searched web queries `Trump Ronaldo FIFA World Cup Draw remarks before draw venue Ronaldo`, `site:whitehouse.gov Trump FIFA World Cup Draw Ronaldo transcript`, and `Trump FIFA World Cup Draw Ronaldo remarks video`. Primary lead found for later evidence: GovInfo DCPD-202501162 titled `Remarks in an Exchange With Reporters Prior to the 2026 Fédération Internationale des Associations de Football (FIFA) World Cup Draw`, URLs https://www.govinfo.gov/app/details/DCPD-202501162 and https://www.govinfo.gov/content/pkg/DCPD-202501162/pdf/DCPD-202501162.pdf. Metadata lead says event Dec. 5, 2025, Kennedy Center at 11:13 a.m., corrected transcript Jan. 2, 2026, incomplete audio. PDF lead includes references to Ronaldo/Messi and is likely favorable on timing/title, but not admitted yet and not cited as record proof. Other leads: White House video/gallery and PBS/YouTube full draw videos for later capture. Cross-turn journal updated at /aar-codex/aar-work-notes.md. Opening will avoid claiming outside leads as admitted proof and will emphasize record gaps and plaintiff burden.

Merits turn notes for arb-ex03a-20260629214245.

Opportunity: arguments:plaintiff, final action submit_argument. Evidence submission allowed; limits reviewed.

Record refresh: get_case/list_evidence/stat_evidence called. Before plaintiff submissions the evidence list contained only the two case-packet files: ev_2c7c2c8a2d76_market-page and ev_a373371a8c9c_presmention-terms. Defendant opening argues that plaintiff must prove the time-period link, not just ambiguity.

Source map: decisive elements are (1) market title/strike/resolution; (2) terms for event-based time periods and exclusions; (3) Trump saying Ronaldo as a standalone spoken word; (4) timing/context showing the remarks were public and event-linked, not backstage/soundcheck/unofficial; (5) market-specific source hierarchy/resolution rationale if available. Adverse source class: official full ceremony/program showing no Ronaldo during formal segment, or proof the clip was separate pre-event reporter access.

Native investigation: White House official page https://www.whitehouse.gov/videos/president-trump-attends-the-fifa-world-cup-drawing/ fetched/opened. web_fetch readability was sparse but web.open captured title/date/related video lines: official page titled President Trump Attends the FIFA World Cup Drawing, dated Dec. 5, 2025, with View Full Video Instagram link and related FIFA World Cup Draw videos. Submitted as ev_db357d4e9407_submitted-evidence-01-plaintiff-db357d4e9407.

YouTube lead https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=Cb2yO0lLEnM. Search and curl captured page metadata/description: title Trump Talks Cristiano Ronaldo at FIFA Draw — 'He's a Great Person'; description says at the FIFA World Cup Draw Ceremony, Donald Trump shared a story about meeting Cristiano Ronaldo at the White House, said Ronaldo was a great person, and mentioned Ronaldo spoke with his son. Submitted as ev_4e1045905547_submitted-evidence-02-plaintiff-4e1045905547 with provenance caveat: public YouTube metadata, not official transcript/audio.

Failed/limited retrieval: Python pip and ensurepip unavailable, so yt-dlp install failed. Direct YouTube caption/open paths were throttled/unavailable; raw HTML extraction was huge but exposed the description. OpenClaw browser open failed because no supported browser found. Kalshi live market page fetch returned Vercel Security Checkpoint/429 and was not submitted. Instagram full video did not yield accessible text through available web open.

Analysis: admitted packet proves market identity and terms. Official White House evidence proves official event video context but not utterance. YouTube metadata evidence is the only admitted source directly tying Trump/Ronaldo/FIFA Draw and should be argued candidly as probative but not best evidence. Terms do not clearly exclude public event-linked remarks before formal program; behind-the-scenes/rehearsal/sound-check exclusions do not fit a public ceremony/event-linked clip on the current evidence. Remaining gap is full video/transcript and market-specific detail; mention this in technical report/search ledger.

Journal updated at /aar-codex/aar-work-notes.md with admitted evidence IDs, failed retrieval paths, source targets, and unresolved gaps.

Defendant merits notes. Opportunity arguments:defendant. Read current record, list_evidence, stat/read plaintiff new evidence. Plaintiff new evidence: ev_db357d4e9407 White House page capture proves official page title/date/link but not video/transcript/audio or timing; ev_4e1045905547 YouTube metadata capture is nonofficial watch-page metadata/description and expressly not an official source or independent audio transcript. Plaintiff concedes live Kalshi blocked, browser unavailable, yt-dlp unavailable, direct YouTube caption/open throttled/unavailable. Defense investigation: retrieved GovInfo official transcript from https://www.govinfo.gov/content/pkg/DCPD-202501162/html/DCPD-202501162.htm with curl; local full HTML size 51,571 bytes, sha256 eadbceeecf3e94f5bd423bcb8e8511165fdc7265dd8c1e025870c2e8f34dfd99. GovInfo title says Remarks in an Exchange With Reporters Prior to the 2026 FIFA World Cup Draw; transcript includes Ronaldo remarks; note says President spoke at 11:13 a.m. at Kennedy Center; corrected transcript Jan. 2, 2026; audio incomplete caveat. Submitted focused capture accepted as ev_a1b1f6b1b7bd_submitted-evidence-03-defendant-a1b1f6b1b7bd. Also searched official FIFA draw start time; official FIFA page says draw commences 12:00 local time / 17:00 UTC Friday Dec. 5 2025 at Kennedy Center. Submitted focused timing capture accepted as ev_3973dc8f98c0_submitted-evidence-04-defendant-3973dc8f98c0. Merits theory: plaintiff may prove word was spoken, but the stronger official sources prove it was before the event, not during it. Terms require word said during time period; no market-specific inclusion of pre-event reporter exchanges in record. Journal updated at /aar-codex/aar-work-notes.md. Filing will offer defendant evidence and argue GovInfo/FIFA are stronger primary sources than plaintiff nonofficial YouTube metadata.

Rebuttal turn notes for arb-ex03a-20260629214245.

Opportunity: rebuttals:plaintiff. Final actions submit_rebuttal or pass. Record scanned with list_evidence. New defendant evidence identified: ev_a1b1f6b1b7bd_submitted-evidence-03-defendant-a1b1f6b1b7bd (GovInfo transcript) and ev_3973dc8f98c0_submitted-evidence-04-defendant-3973dc8f98c0 (FIFA start-time capture). stat_evidence and read_evidence_range used for both in full, and for plaintiff YouTube metadata item.

Defendant strongest points: GovInfo transcript is official and titled "Remarks in an Exchange With Reporters Prior to the 2026 FIFA World Cup Draw." It confirms Ronaldo utterances: Trump met Ronaldo at the White House, says Ronaldo is great, and says he was not Ronaldo or Messi. It notes Trump spoke at 11:13 a.m. at the John F. Kennedy Center and that the transcript was corrected Jan. 2, 2026; portions could not be verified because audio was incomplete. FIFA official page capture states the draw commenced at 12:00 local time on Dec. 5, 2025.

Assessment: Defendant evidence is strong on formal program start time and transcript classification. Plaintiff should not deny 11:13/noon or the title. Rebuttal should focus on market construction: the title in the market was broad public-facing "during the FIFA World Cup Draw," not "after noon" or "during the formal ball-draw broadcast." The GovInfo transcript itself confirms the remarks occurred at the Kennedy Center, were about/around the Draw, and included Ronaldo in a soccer/FIFA exchange. The terms permit event-based periods and allow Exchange to specify inclusions; absent market-specific exclusion, generic behind-the-scenes/rehearsal/sound-check exclusions do not cover an official presidential reporter exchange at the event venue.

No new native search likely to overcome the official transcript within this phase. Journal updated. File focused rebuttal; cite/offer visible defendant evidence if useful, especially to use the confirmed Ronaldo utterance and event context.

Defendant surrebuttal notes. Opportunity surrebuttals:defendant. Inspected get_case/list_evidence/stat for defense evidence. Plaintiff rebuttal added no new evidence; evidence list unchanged after merits. Plaintiff concedes key DX-1/DX-2 facts: GovInfo transcript official, title labels remarks as `Prior to` FIFA World Cup Draw, exchange at 11:13 a.m. at Kennedy Center, FIFA official page says draw commenced 12:00 local. Plaintiff's remaining point is construction: market title did not expressly exclude official venue press remarks immediately before formal program. Defense response: burden remains on plaintiff to prove inclusion in the specified time period, not on defendant to find an exclusion. Ordinary `during` cannot include a transcript officially titled prior to the event and 47 minutes before official start merely because same venue and event topic. Terms allow event-based periods and Exchange-specified inclusions; no record-specific inclusion exists. No new source search needed because rebuttal raises legal interpretation, not new factual evidence. Journal updated at /aar-codex/aar-work-notes.md.

Closing turn notes for arb-ex03a-20260629214245.

Opportunity: closings:plaintiff, final action deliver_closing_statement. No evidence submission permitted.

Record refresh: get_case, list_evidence, and stat_evidence for defendant GovInfo transcript and FIFA timing evidence completed. Evidence list stable: market page packet, presmention terms, plaintiff White House page capture, plaintiff YouTube metadata capture, defendant GovInfo transcript, defendant FIFA start-time capture. Defendant surrebuttal argues plaintiff conceded official 11:13 prior-to transcript and 12:00 commencement, and that ordinary event language has a start.

Closing assessment: strongest adverse evidence is official GovInfo transcript title/timing plus FIFA 12:00 start. Plaintiff should not deny those facts. Strongest plaintiff evidence/argument: GovInfo confirms Ronaldo utterances, Kennedy Center location, FIFA/World Cup subject metadata, and official public reporter exchange; market title/generic terms do not clearly say countable period starts only at formal noon commencement or excludes official event-site remarks immediately before formal program. Terms exclude rehearsals/sound checks/behind-scenes/captions, not official public reporter exchanges. Closing should be candid, frame the decision as market construction, and argue No should not be upheld by importing a narrow formal-program limitation absent market-specific language.

Journal updated at /aar-codex/aar-work-notes.md.

Defendant closing notes. Opportunity closings:defendant. Performed final get_case and list_evidence scan. No new evidence after surrebuttal; plaintiff closing added no evidence. Existing decisive evidence remains DX-1/ev_a1b1f6b1b7bd GovInfo official transcript titled remarks in exchange with reporters prior to FIFA World Cup Draw, with 11:13 a.m. note and Ronaldo passages; DX-2/ev_3973dc8f98c0 FIFA official page stating Draw commenced 12:00 local. Plaintiff closing concedes the formal timing evidence is defendant's strongest and frames as ambiguity/no clear exclusion. Closing approach: emphasize proposition and burden. The proposition requires Yes because remarks immediately before the formal program supposedly count; plaintiff must prove during the time period by preponderance. Official source says before, not during. Absence of express exclusion is not affirmative inclusion; venue/topic/public/official context cannot override timing. Journal updated at /aar-codex/aar-work-notes.md.
